changes.value: In /Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-tools/ane-embedding/tests/integration_test.rs line 119, assert_eq!(embedder.embedding_dimension(), Some(384)) fails because embedding_dimension() returns None when called through a &dyn TextEmbedder trait object. Same root cause as test_load_model -- the dimension is not being stored after model load.
Fix test_trait_object_usage: embedding_dimension() returns None via trait object
